proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[G, G](a.mul)
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G) { a * k0 = a * w0 and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: G satisfy { a * w0 = a * w1 and w0 != w1 }
let w2: G satisfy { a * w0 = a * w2 and w0 != w2 }
function(x0: G, x1: G) { a * x0 != a * x1 or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)
